title: Data for "Initial survey of blue ice areas for the recovery of old ice in the Sør Rondane mountains (Dronning Maud Land, East Antarctica)"
author: Izeboud, Maaike
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Underlying and Extended data for field report "Initial survey of blue ice areas for the recovery of old ice in the Sør Rondane mountains (Dronning Maud Land, East Antarctica)". 
 Underlying data: 
 
 survey_plans.zip: planned field tracks or points, used as to navigate to/along point/track of interest with snow mobile (skidoo). Contains files for each measurement type (ablation_stakes; drilling_survey; isotope_survey; mala GPR tracks; meteorite_search area; pRES points). Files in .gpx or .shp format. 
 surveyed_points.zip: full log of all skidoo tracks by the four scientists in the field as well as measured waypoints (with handheld gps) for ice istopes and stake locations. 
 Overview_planned.pdf and overvew_surved.png for reference of the different files.  
 Video montage showing the work tasks 
 
 Extended data.zip 
 
 Excel with Measured ice core temperatures (locations and method detailed in report) 
 Templates for ApRES and GNSS measurements 
 Measurement protocol for GNSS using Trimble Receiver Antenna 
 Ice core cutting strategy
